subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Lord of Eternity, Who, through the Most Great Name, hath illumined the world with a wondrous light and set it ablaze with the fire of the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک قدم را که باسم اعظم عالم را بنور بدیع منور و بنار سدره مشتعل فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for spiritual recognition
